title: PlotThread
description: A narrative thread: a story arc, mystery, conflict, or ongoing situation.

description.description: Summary of the plot thread based on transcript evidence.

related_entities.description: IDs of entities involved in this thread.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions within this thread. Do not answer with inference; list as questions.

key_turns.description: Turn IDs that contain significant events for this thread.

first_seen_turn.description: Turn ID when this thread was first identified.

last_updated_turn.description: Turn ID of the most recent update.
